# fpcloud_app (Data Source)

Use this data source to read a Fogpipe application by ID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The application ID.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The creation timestamp of the application.
- `image` (String) The container image for the application.
- `max_scale` (Number) The maximum number of instances.
- `min_scale` (Number) The minimum number of instances.
- `name` (String) The application name.
- `port` (Number) The port the application listens on.
- `project_id` (String) The ID of the project this app belongs to.
- `status` (String) The current status of the application.
- `url` (String) The URL where the application is accessible.
- `url_slug` (String) The vanity host override, if set (empty when the host is derived from the app/project/org names).
